title: Vidyarthi
overview: Chaitanya joins late in an agricultural college where upper caste domination rules are valued. Bhoopathi, Maha Lakshmi’s father, is the head of that area. What will happen when Bhoopathi’s rival Satyam attacks him and his daughter ?
